sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116430" key="w)sxofore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠσχο-φορέω</orth>, <sense id="n116430.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">celebrate the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὠσχοφόρια,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
